sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92356" key="r(h/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥήσσω</orth>, <sense id="n92356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥήγνυμι</ref></xr>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n92356.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥάσσω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥῃστώνη</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥᾳστώνη</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
